profile.heading: Profile
profile.lead: Modify your username and email. You must first confirm your current password; only you can修改 your account.
profile.totpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (required because 2FA is enabled).
profile.invalidTotp: Invalid code. Check your app and try again.
profile.verifyFailed: Unable to verify your password. Please try again.
profile.emailChangeHint: Changing email will log you out on all devices.
profile.passwordChangeHint: Changing password will log you out on all devices.
profile.nothingToSave: Modify at least one field before saving.
profile.sessionExpired: Verification expired. Please enter your password again.
